update.releaseNotes:
v1.0.4 - Changelog
> [!NOTE] > Jacob-Met custom fork (Trackblazer). Based on upstream v5.6.1.
Agenda & irregular training --- - **Agenda race calendar** in Racing Settings — autofill with user agenda (independent of irregular training) - **Agenda-linked irregular training** — schedule autofill, per-grade min gain, Wit charm path, agenda skip-to-race fixes - **Megaphone-aware irregular training** — optional active-megaphone gain; items on irregular turns; no Reset Whistles on irregular
Megaphone forecast & conservation (off by default) --- - **Race-forecast megaphones** — force use when effective race count in buff window ≤ threshold; ignores min-gain floors - **Full-window item-aware simulation** — irregular-as-train days, charm/energy reserves, Wit irregular rules - **Separate irregular energy toggles** — execution vs forecast simulation - **Tier overwrite** on base gain (respects summer 60/40 rule) - **G1 hammer conservation** — spare last Artisan/Master before upcoming G1 on agenda - **Revalidate after items** — optional; Reset Whistle always rechecks
